title: 无法打开
author: qiqi3273
body:
<!--
- 影梭（Shadowsocks）是一个开源非盈利项目，不提供任何托管服务。如果你是从服务提供商购买的服务，请联系他们。
- 如果你有非影梭Windows客户端相关的问题，请去 https://github.com/shadowsocks
- 提问前请先阅读wiki https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows/wiki/Troubleshooting.
- 并在Issue Board中搜索 https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows/issues?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=is%3Aissue
- 请按照以下格式描述你的问题，描述不清的问题将会被关闭。
-->

### 简要描述问题

### 环境

- Shadowsocks客户端版本：4.4.1.0
- 操作系统版本：Windows 11 家庭版 中文版  25H2
- .NET版本：6.0.16

### 操作步骤
打开软件

### 期望的结果
正常打开

### 实际结果
无法打开，跳出对话：非预期错误，Shadowsocks将退出。请提交此错误到 https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows/issues
System.TypelnitializationException: " Shadowsocks.Controller.GeositeUpdater"的类型初始值设定项引发异 常。 ---> System.UnauthorizedAccessException: 对路径"ss_win_temp "的访问被拒绝。
在 System.IO._Error.WinlOError(Int32 errorCode, String maybeFullPath) 
在 System.IO.Directory.InternalCreateDirectory(String fullPath, String path, Object dirSecurityObj, Boolean checkHost) 
在 System.IO.Directory.InternalCreateDirectoryHelper(String path, Boolean checkHost) 
在 System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(String path) 
在 Shadowsocks.Util.Utils.GetTempPath() 
在 Shadowsocks.Util.Utils.GetTempPath(String filename) 
在 Shadowsocks.Controller.GeositeUpdater..cctorO) 
---内部异常堆栈跟踪的结尾--- 
在 Shadowsocks.Controller.GeositeUpdater.CheckGeositeGroup(String group) 
在 Shadowsocks.Model.Configuration.ValidateGeositeGroupList(List'1 groups) 
在 Shadowsocks.Model.Configuration.Process(Configuration& config) 
在 Shadowsocks.Controller.ShadowsocksController.ctor() 
在 Shadowsocks.Program.Main(String[l args)

### 配置文件和日志文件（请隐去敏感信息）

```
在此粘贴日志
```

title: 配置文件加密，防止扫描
author: windstander
body: 不那么轻易让一些软件扫描到配置文件里的内容。

title: 使用clash后却无法正常使用chrome
author: Thought-bit
body: 本人昨晚鼓捣v2rayn的翻墙，最后卡在更新订阅那一步，每次更新后读取订阅都会失败，于是删除了v2rayn。奇怪的是本人平时使用的clash现在只能在edge上翻墙以及chrome的无痕模式，但是chrome的正常模式搜索会一直转圈，不会显示连接断开，请大佬们帮帮我

title: Chrome不能用SS但是Edge 能用
author: naoh2004
body:
chrome版本号143.0.7499.41（正式版本） （64 位）的
Shadowsocks 版本是 4.3.3.170 我用这么低的版本号是因为 加密协议是aes-128-cfb 不知道为什么新版不支持这个了
我用的别人的ss梯子如果改了那么别人改动很大，能不能在新版支持这个协议

还有有遇到我这情况的吗？我用旧版chrome就可以

我不知道是不是因为Chrome更新的原因 我用v2rayN的同一个梯子开tun就能用Chrome联网但是不开就无法联网，你们有没有这个问题

title: Bypassing RTC?
author: FrameMuse
body:
**Problem**

RTC-based communication channels are not bypassed by Shadowsocks at all, tested by Chinese and Russia people.

**Solution**
I'm not really into how Shadowsocks works. Is there anything that can be done to apply proxying on RTC-based channels? Maybe some plugins out there that can be mentioned?

This would include: Discord, Google Meet, Telegram Calls, etc.

https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows/issues/3366

title: 这么优秀的开源项目就这么放弃了吗？
author: robot-dot-win
body: 强烈希望大侠们继续维护！跪求支持[SIP022 AEAD-2022](https://shadowsocks.org/doc/sip022.html)

title: Critical: Weak KDF Enables Offline Brute-Force Attacks
author: pascscha
body:
This implementation is affected by a critical cryptographic weakness in the Shadowsocks protocol that enables passive attackers to perform offline brute-force attacks against recorded traffic.

I have created an issue with full details at https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-org/issues/297

title: 请发行个新版本吧
author: robot-dot-win
body: 看到10个月之前修复了一个bug，希望能发行一个新版本。当前版本还是2022年发行的，虽然稳如磐石。

title: [Question] Command line support?
author: rundexz
body:
Hello. Does this project offer command line support?

Edit: Never mind. I have noticed discussions tab. I will ask there.

title: help me
author: dangducloi

title: Privoxy error
author: Xykyma
body:
**Describe the bug**
Я скачал и настроил Shadowsocks+Cloak плагин. И при нажатии на "Для всей системы" в браузере отображается такое сообщение для не заблокированных сайтов. А для заблокированных просто не подключается. При этом тот же Телеграм продолжает работать. Те же самые настройки прекрасно работают в Shadowrocket на iOs.

**Environment**
Shadowsocks client version: 4.4.1.0
OS version: Windows 11 23h2
.NET version: 8.0.18

**Steps you have tried**
Пробовал менять настройки в Proxy, но ничего не помогло.

**What did you expect to see?**
Работу прокси и получение нового ip.

**What did you see instead?**
Сообщение об ошибки (скриншот)

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6201fc5d-1689-473b-abd5-7841d4edf3f4)

title: System.NullReferenceException
author: Ivan123445
body:
<!--

- Please include the following information. Questions lacking details will be closed.
-->

### Describe the bug
Я запустил ShadowSocks.exe. Иконка программы появилась в панели снизу, рядом с wi-fi.
После чего я нажал на нее правой кнопкой мыши -> Системный прокси-сервер -> Для всей системы

Каждый раз выполняю эти шаги для запуска, до и после этого такой ошибки не возникало
### Environment

- Shadowsocks client version:
- OS version: Windows 11
- .NET version:

### Steps you have tried
Я запустил ShadowSocks.exe. Иконка программы появилась в панели снизу, рядом с wi-fi.
После чего я нажал на нее правой кнопкой мыши -> Системный прокси-сервер -> Для всей системы

### What did you expect to see?
Включение прокси

### What did you see instead?
Сообщение об ошибки (скриншот)


title: 连接了两天之后，突然连接不上，但换了端口后又成功，想问这是为什么呢？
author: grntomato
body: 连接了两天之后，这期间断过几次，然后今天再打开ShadowsocksR-dotnet4.0，发现上不去Google了，服务器连接统计总显示超时99，我就换了一个端口，（我之前是用一键安装脚本安装的），又通过这个脚本修改了端口，就可以上去了，很想问一下这是为什么呢？谢谢！

title: could not find DLL "libsscrypto.dll"
author: emilydies
body:
<!--
- Shadowsocks is a non-profit open source project. If you bought the service from a provider, please contact them.
- If you have questions rather than Shadowsocks Windows client, please go to https://github.com/shadowsocks
- Please read Wiki carefully, especially https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows/wiki/Troubleshooting
- And search from Issue Board https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows/issues?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=is%3Aissue
- Please include the following information. Questions lacking details will be closed.
-->

### Describe the bug

Непредвиденная ошибка, пожалуйста сообщите на https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows/issu
es
System.DIINotFoundException: Не удается загрузить DLL "libsscrypto.dll": The specified module could not be found. (Исклочение из нRESULT: 0x8007007E)
B Shadowsocks.Encryption.MbedTLS.md5_ret(Byte[] input, UInt32 ilen, Byte[] output)
B
Shadowsocks.Encryption.MbedTLS.MD5(Byte[] input)
B Shadowsocks.Controller.PACServer.GetHash(String
content)
B
Shadowsocks.Controller.PACServer.UpdatePACURL(Configurati
on config)
B Shadowsocks.Controller.ShadowsocksController.Reload()
B
Shadowsocks.Controller.ShadowsocksController.Start(Boolea
n systemWakeUp)
B Shadowsocks.Program.Main(String[] args)
### Environment

- Shadowsocks client version: 4.4.1.0
- OS version: Windows 11 24H2 26100.1742
- .NET version: 4.8.09032

### Steps you have tried
basically this message appears everytime i open shadowsocks.
i did try to reinstall it in different directories, didnt help.

### What did you see instead?
this message

```
   в Shadowsocks.Encryption.MbedTLS.MD5(Byte[] input)
```

title: Importing an address from the clipboard on the Edit Servers page
author: tony-0tis
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Importing ss:// from the clipboard currently works through the menu. I would like to be able to run import from clipboard on the Edit Servers page.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
Add an “Import from Buffer” button to the Edit Servers page.
